summary: Iteration 90 - Operational Notes & Activity Timeline feature testing completed. Backend: 20/20 tests passed for activity CRUD, system auto-generation, and Operations Queue enrichment. Frontend: Operations Queue displays Activity Today (1), Stale >7d (119) cards, Sort: Latest Activity dropdown, Last Activity column with timeAgo, detail panel with activity info. ActivityTimelineSection component code verified in InventoryLedgerPage.js for SO workflow and PO Draft detail views.

issues: Console hydration warning: span inside tbody/tr - cosmetic issue from React dev mode, doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Operations Queue activity features verified via UI testing)

seed_data_used.queue_items: 120 total items, 119 stale (>7d), 1 with recent activity
seed_data_used.test_activities: Multiple TEST- prefixed activities created during testing
seed_data_used.SO-TEST-001: Has manual note activity (shown in Operations Queue detail panel)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 - Activity Timeline feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST/GET /api/inventory-ledger/activities. System auto-generates activities for: assignments, approvals (request/decision), documents, escalations. Operations Queue enriched with latest_activity_at, latest_activity_type, activity_count per item, plus dashboard counts recent_activity_today and no_recent_activity_7d. sort_by=latest_activity and stale_days filters work. Frontend: Operations Queue page shows Activity Today and Stale (>7d) cards, Sort: Latest Activity dropdown, Last Activity column with timeAgo, detail panel shows activity info. ActivityTimelineSection component in InventoryLedgerPage.js (lines 1044-1157) is used in SO workflow drawer and PO Draft detail drawer - includes add-note form, activity type filter, and scrollable timeline list with type badges.

system_auto_generation.assignment_create: Creates activity with type='assignment', title='Assigned to {owner}'
system_auto_generation.assignment_update: Creates activity with type='assignment', title='Reassigned to {owner} | Status: {status}'
system_auto_generation.approval_request: Creates activity with type='approval', title='Approval requested ({type})'
system_auto_generation.document_link: Creates activity with type='document', title='Document linked: {name}'
system_auto_generation.escalation_create: Creates activity with type='escalation', title='Due date set: {date}'

new_params: stale_days (filter items with no activity in N days)

features: Add note form (title/body inputs + Add Note button)

mocked_apis_note: Email service is mocked. BC API uses demo mode.
